description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian dressed in a striking, urban-inspired outfit featuring a high-collared, asymmetrical jacket with layered shoulder armor and a dramatic cape-like extension. The jacket is adorned with metallic accents and red highlights, giving it a futuristic, tactical appearance. Underneath, the figure wears fitted pants with intricate patterns and a scarf or mask covering the lower half of the face, adding an element of anonymity and style. The arms are accessorized with wristbands and the hands are left uncovered. The footwear consists of simple, slip-on shoes that contrast with the otherwise elaborate attire. The figure's hair is styled short and textured, completing the modern, streetwise look.
description: A stylish adult male pedestrian in a futuristic, armored jacket with a cape, patterned pants, and slip-on shoes, featuring a high-collared scarf and wrist accessories.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered shoulder armor, high-collared scarf, and the dramatic cape draping over the left arm.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the full extent of the cape, the back details of the jacket, and the fitted pants.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the asymmetrical jacket design and the way the cape falls over the right arm.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the high-collared scarf, chest armor, wristbands, and the overall fitted, urban style.
attribute_clothing_type: futuristic armored jacket with cape, fitted patterned pants, high-collared scarf, and wristbands
